title: STATUS Kansas Single Hot Plate, 1500W White Electric Cooker with Stainless Steel Ring, 5 Heat Settings, Power Indicator Light, Overheat Protection, 1m Cord, (KANSAS1PKB4)
features: SINGLE HOT PLATE WITH 1500W STAINLESS STEEL RING: STATUS delivers reliable performance with this powerful 1500W single hot plate, ideal for cooking, frying or warming in kitchens, offices or compact spaces.
FIVE HEAT SETTINGS WITH ROTARY CONTROL DIAL: Choose from five adjustable heat levels to suit your cooking needs — from low simmering to rapid boiling — using the easy-turn rotary dial.
POWER INDICATOR LIGHT FOR SAFE OPERATION: A built-in power indicator light clearly shows when the appliance is switched on and heating, helping to prevent accidental contact or misuse.
OVERHEAT PROTECTION WITH AUTOMATIC SHUT-OFF: Fitted with integrated safety cut-off to prevent overheating. A dependable cooking solution for shared accommodation, caravans or temporary setups.
GLOSS WHITE FINISH WITH 1 METRE POWER CORD: The easy-clean body and long power cable offer convenient placement on any worktop or counter without being limited by socket position.
description: From the manufacturer About Us With people and innovation right at the heart of our business, Status International (UK) , ("Status"), has earned its position as the UK’s independent supplier of lighting and electrical accessories. Status is run by father and son, Peter and Nicholas McVeigh, who between them have over 80 years combined experience in the lighting industry. Status boasts a customer base across the UK and Europe including major national retailers, wholesalers, independent retailers and electrical wholesalers. In 2016, Status celebrated its 25th anniversary. Status is located at its head office in Cleckheaton, West Yorkshire, with a warehouse, distribution centre, in house design studio and laboratory.
